sentences.en: You got ready all by yourself today!
sentences.zh: 你今天自己準備好了耶！
sentences.ipa: /juː ɡɑːt ˈredi ɔːl baɪ jɔːrˈself təˈdeɪ/

sentences.en: You cleaned your whole plate, great job!
sentences.zh: 你把整盤都吃完了，真棒！
sentences.ipa: /juː kliːnd jʊər hoʊl pleɪt ɡreɪt dʒɑːb/

sentences.en: Sweet dreams, I'll see you in the morning.
sentences.zh: 祝你有個好夢，早上見。
sentences.ipa: /swiːt driːmz aɪl siː juː ɪn ðə ˈmɔːrnɪŋ/

sentences.en: That was such a fun trip, wasn't it?
sentences.zh: 這趟旅行真好玩，對吧？
sentences.ipa: /ðæt wʌz sʌtʃ ə fʌn trɪp ˈwʌzənt ɪt/

sentences.en: You climbed all the way to the top!
sentences.zh: 你爬到最頂端了耶！
sentences.ipa: /juː klaɪmd ɔːl ðə weɪ tuː ðə tɑːp/

sentences.en: You made a new friend today, that's wonderful.
sentences.zh: 你今天交了一個新朋友，太棒了。
sentences.ipa: /juː meɪd ə nuː frend təˈdeɪ ðæts ˈwʌndərfəl/

sentences.en: I'm proud of how hard you studied.
sentences.zh: 我為你這麼認真讀書感到驕傲。
sentences.ipa: /aɪm praʊd ʌv haʊ hɑːrd juː ˈstʌdid/

sentences.en: Look how nicely you two are playing together!
sentences.zh: 你們兩個玩得真好耶！
sentences.ipa: /lʊk haʊ ˈnaɪsli juː tuː ɑːr ˈpleɪɪŋ təˈɡeðər/

sentences.en: You did a great job calming yourself down.
sentences.zh: 你把自己冷靜下來做得很棒。
sentences.ipa: /juː dɪd ə ɡreɪt dʒɑːb ˈkɑːmɪŋ jɔːrˈself daʊn/

sentences.en: Thank you for following the rules today.
sentences.zh: 謝謝你今天有遵守規矩。
sentences.ipa: /θæŋk juː fɔːr ˈfɑːloʊɪŋ ðə ruːlz təˈdeɪ/

sentences.en: Keep up the good work, buddy!
sentences.zh: 繼續保持，小傢伙！
sentences.ipa: /kiːp ʌp ðə ɡʊd wɜːrk ˈbʌdi/

sentences.en: You were so careful today, well done.
sentences.zh: 你今天很小心，做得好。
sentences.ipa: /juː wɜːr soʊ ˈkerfəl təˈdeɪ wel dʌn/

sentences.en: You were so brave at the doctor's today.
sentences.zh: 你今天在醫生那裡真的很勇敢。
sentences.ipa: /juː wɜːr soʊ breɪv æt ðə ˈdɑːktərz təˈdeɪ/

sentences.en: Say goodbye and thank you before we leave.
sentences.zh: 離開前要說再見跟謝謝。
sentences.ipa: /seɪ ɡʊdˈbaɪ ənd θæŋk juː bɪˈfɔːr wiː liːv/

sentences.en: I'm glad you made up with your friend.
sentences.zh: 我很高興你跟朋友和好了。
sentences.ipa: /aɪm ɡlæd juː meɪd ʌp wɪð jʊər frend/

sentences.en: You had such good manners today.
sentences.zh: 你今天很有禮貌。
sentences.ipa: /juː hæd sʌtʃ ɡʊd ˈmænərz təˈdeɪ/

sentences.en: You dressed perfectly for this weather!
sentences.zh: 你今天穿得很適合這種天氣！
sentences.ipa: /juː drest ˈpɜːrfɪktli fɔːr ðɪs ˈweðər/

sentences.en: I liked that you turned off the TV yourself.
sentences.zh: 我很欣賞你自己主動關電視。
sentences.ipa: /aɪ laɪkt ðæt juː tɜːrnd ɔːf ðə ˌtiːˈviː jɔːrˈself/

sentences.en: What a wonderful celebration we had today!
sentences.zh: 我們今天的慶祝活動真棒！
sentences.ipa: /wʌt ə ˈwʌndərfəl ˌselɪˈbreɪʃən wiː hæd təˈdeɪ/

sentences.en: Sweet dreams, we'll read more tomorrow.
sentences.zh: 祝好夢，我們明天再繼續讀。
sentences.ipa: /swiːt driːmz wiːl riːd mɔːr təˈmɑːroʊ/
